Subject: Re: Hiring Update - DevOps Lead Position

Thanks Alice,

I reviewed the RFC for Data Governance. Some thoughts:

- Section 6 needs more detail on the rollback strategy    
- The uptime numbers in Table 5 don't match what I see in the Logging
Service dashboard (showing 45% vs your 55%)
- Can we add a dependency map for the Logging Service integration?
- The timeline for Marketing involvement seems optimistic

Happy to discuss in our Wednesday sync.    

Cheers,
Irene
--   
Irene White
Senior Product Manager | Globex
+1-812-771-9862

subject: Re: Hiring Update - DevOps Lead Position
content:
Hi Irene,

Thanks for the update. A few quick thoughts:

- Agreed on the Auth Service approach. Irene and I discussed this yesterday
and we're aligned.
- For the Marketing budget, I'd suggest we cap it at $122K for now and
revisit in Q4.    
- The conversion rate improvement looks promising — let's make sure we have
proper monitoring via Notification Hub before going live.

I'll update the Titan tracker accordingly.

Best,
Irene

Irene Brown | Engineering Manager

subject: Re: Hiring Update - DevOps Lead Position
content:
Alice — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Priya from Support to get their
perspective on the Auth Service changes. In the meantime, I've created a
shared doc where we can track the open items:

  https://docs.google.com/d/eb160de1de89d905

Current open items (4 total):
- Catalyst integration testing (owner: Alice)
- StreamLine Solutions contract review (owner: Irene)
- Data Governance documentation (owner: Priya)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before
our Thursday sync.

Thanks,
Irene
